lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜਨ ਜਾਨਿ ਭਜਹਿ ਪੁਰਖੋਤਮੁ ਤਾ ਚੀ ਅਬਿਗਤੁ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: jo jan jaan bhajeh purakhotam taa chee abigat baanee |
lines.english: That humble being who knows, and meditates on the Supreme Primal Being - his word becomes eternal.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੋ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਸਮਤੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sabho hukam hukam hai aape nirbhau samat beechaaree |3|
lines.english: He Himself is the Commander; all are under His Command. The Fearless Lord looks on all alike. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਾ ਕਹੈ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਅਲਖ ਬਿਡਾਣੀ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: naamaa kahai jagajeevan paaeaa hiradai alakh biddaanee |4|1|
lines.english: Says Naam Dayv, I have found the Invisible, Wondrous Lord, the Life of the World, within my heart. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ਰਾਮੁ ਰਹਿਆ ਰਵਿ ਐਸਾ ਰੂਪੁ ਬਖਾਨਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sarab nirantar raam rahiaa rav aisaa roop bakhaaniaa |1|
lines.english: The Lord is pervading and permeating amongst all; this is how His Form can be described. ||1||
Prabhaatee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਜੁਗਾਦਿ ਜੁਗਾਦਿ ਜੁਗੋ ਜੁਗੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aad jugaad jugaad jugo jug taa kaa ant na jaaniaa |
lines.english: He existed in the beginning, in the primeval age, and all throughout the ages; His limits cannot be known.
The Lord of the Universe appears when the Word of His Shabad is chanted.
My Lord is the Embodiment of Bliss. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬੇ ਆਦਿ ਪਰਮਲਾਦਿ ਕਾਸਟ ਚੰਦਨੁ ਭੈਇਲਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sarabe aad paramalaad kaasatt chandan bhaieilaa |2|
lines.english: God, the Primal Source of everything, is like the sandalwood tree; He transforms us woody trees into fragrant sandalwood. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਵਨ ਬੀਖੂ ਬਾਨੈ ਬੀਖੇ ਬਾਸੁ ਤੇ ਸੁਖ ਲਾਗਿਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: baavan beekhoo baanai beekhe baas te sukh laagilaa |
lines.english: The beautiful fragrance of sandalwood emanates from the sandalwood tree, and attaches to the other trees of the forest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਰਤਨੁ ਲਾਲੁ ਨਾਮਾ ਸਾਚਿ ਸਮਾਇਲਾ ॥੩॥੨॥
lines.translit: too deaal ratan laal naamaa saach samaaeilaa |3|2|
lines.english: You are Merciful; You are the gem and the jewel. Naam Dayv is absorbed in the Truth. ||3||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮੑ ਚੇ ਪਾਰਸੁ ਹਮ ਚੇ ਲੋਹਾ ਸੰਗੇ ਕੰਚਨੁ ਭੈਇਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: tuma che paaras ham che lohaa sange kanchan bhaieilaa |
lines.english: You, O Lord, are the Philosopher's Stone, and I am iron; associating with You, I am transformed into gold.
The Primal Being has no ancestry; He has staged this play.
God is hidden deep within each and every heart. ||1||
Prabhaatee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਕੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਨ ਜਾਨੈ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jeea kee jot na jaanai koee |
lines.english: No one knows the Light of the soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੈ ਮੈ ਕੀਆ ਸੁ ਮਾਲੂਮੁ ਹੋਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tai mai keea su maaloom hoee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Whatever I do, is known to You, Lord. ||1||Pause||
Just as the pitcher is made from clay,
The mortal's actions hold the soul in the bondage of karma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕੀਆ ਸੁ ਆਪੈ ਆਪੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jo kichh keea su aapai aapai |3|
lines.english: Whatever he does, he does on his own. ||3||
everything is made from the Beloved Divine Creator Himself. ||2||
Whoever abides in the Lord, becomes immortal. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਣਵਤਿ ਨਾਮਦੇਉ ਇਹੁ ਜੀਉ ਚਿਤਵੈ ਸੁ ਲਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: pranavat naamadeo ihu jeeo chitavai su lahai |
lines.english: Prays Naam Dayv, whatever this soul wants, it obtains.
Prabhaatee, The Word Of Devotee Baynee Jee:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
You rub your body with sandalwood oil, and place basil leaves on your forehead.
You try to look like a Vaishnaav, but the breath of life escapes through your mouth. ||1||
But you hold a knife in the hand of your heart.
You look like a thug; pretending to meditate, you pose like a crane.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰੂਰ ਦਿਸਟਿ ਰਤਾ ਨਿਸਿ ਬਾਦੰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kraoor disatt rataa nis baadan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: But your gaze is evil, and your nights are wasted in conflict. ||1||Pause||
You pray for hours to God the Beautiful.
wear two loin-cloths, perform religious rituals and put only milk in your mouth.
You routinely steal the property of others. ||2||
You perform daily cleansing rituals,
But in your heart, you have drawn out the sword.
You worship the stone idol, and paint ceremonial marks of Ganesha.
You dance, but your consciousness is filled with evil.
You remain awake throughout the night, pretending to worship God.
You wear the rosary beads of Shiva around your neck, but your heart is filled with falsehood.
You put the sacred mark, the tilak, on your forehead.
You are lewd and depraved - this is such an unrighteous dance! ||3||
You sit on a deer-skin, and chant on your mala.
Whoever does not realize the essence of the soul
all his religious actions are hollow and false.
You are lewd and depraved - you do not chant God's Name. ||4||
Without the True Guru, you shall not find the Way. ||5||1||
Says Baynee, as Gurmukh, meditate.
